chat.enterHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline
chat.cwdPlaceholder: /absolute/path (optional; defaults to the default working directory)
chat.emptyHeroBody: Use this thread for coding tasks, project inspection, and focused fixes.
chat.heroSubtitle: Pick a local agent, give it a working directory, then start coding, inspecting, or reshaping the project.

starter.one: Analyze the current project structure and suggest next steps
starter.two: Check recent changes for UI/UX issues
starter.three: Implement a small feature and explain how to verify it

analyze.label: Analyze project
analyze.prompt: Analyze the current project structure and tell me what I can do first

modify.label: Edit code
modify.prompt: Modify code based on my needs and provide verification steps

review.label: Code review
review.prompt: Review the risks, issues, and improvements in the current changes

errors.attachmentLimit: Add at most {{count}} attachments per message.
errors.attachmentTooLarge: {{name}} exceeds the 50 MB attachment size limit.
errors.attachmentType: {{name}} is not a supported attachment type.
errors.attachmentDesktopOnly: Attachments require the Electron desktop app.
errors.cliBridgeUnavailable: FreeBuddy CLI bridge is unavailable. Please run the Electron desktop app.
errors.agentNotInstalled: {{agent}} is not installed. Open Settings → Cli Agents to install.
